title: S&P 500 Stocks: Hot EV Play Among Winners; Streaming Media Giant Is 'Dragon' Behind
text: Fertilizer stock Mosaic and lithium giant Albemarle led the S&P 500 Monday. Streaming media giant Warner Bros Discovery was a big loser.

title: Aptiv's (APTV) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Decline Y/Y
text: Aptiv's (APTV) second-quarter 2022 revenues increase year over year.

title: Aptiv PLC (APTV) CEO Kevin Clark on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 4, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Jessica Kourakos - Vice President, Investor Relations Kevin Clark - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Joe Massaro - Chief Financial Officer and Senior Vice President, Business Operations Conference Call Participants Joseph Spak - RBC Capital Markets Rod Lache - Wolfe Research Emmanuel Rosner - Deutsche Bank Chris McNally - Evercore David Kelley - Jefferies Itay Michaeli - Citi John Murphy - Bank of America Operator Good day and welcome to the Aptiv Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. My name is Jennifer and I will be your conference operator today.

title: Aptiv PLC (APTV) Lags Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Aptiv PLC (APTV) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -64.52% and 0.96%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Aptiv Reports Second Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: Record Bookings and Robust Revenue Growth Despite Difficult Macro Environment DUBLIN , Aug. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener and more connected, today reported a second quarter 2022 U.S. GAAP loss of $0.23 per diluted share. Excluding special items, second quarter earnings totaled $0.22 per diluted share.

title: Aptiv to Present at the J.P. Morgan Auto Conference
text: DUBLIN , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener, and more connected, will present at the J.P. Morgan 2022 Auto Conference, August 9 at 3:05 p.m.

title: Aptiv (APTV) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Aptiv's (APTV) second-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues are likely to have increased year over year.
